title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: The video argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI development workflow, especially as teams grow. It advocates for TypeScript over Python due to type checking, language server protocol support, and compile-time feedback mechanisms that reduce runtime mistakes and improve collaboration.
